title: Feature request: adjustable gridlines for the boards
excerpt: Hello everyone. We have a feature request. It would be very helpful and ergonomic, to adjust the colour of the gridlines of the tables / boards, just as it is possible in excel sheets. The grid lines are too bright and d…

posts.author: Andreas_Eberhardt (Andreas Eberhardt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone. We have a feature request. It would be very helpful and ergonomic, to adjust the colour of the gridlines of the tables / boards, just as it is possible in excel sheets. The grid lines are too bright and don’t stand out enough from the background of the board.

In the dark mode, the gridlines are well visible. In the light mode however, they are poorly visible, which is problematic for some of our users. Especially, if they want to adjust the width of the columns.

Thank you very much
